title: Oracle C2M Training
description:
Oracle c2m training covers concepts from the Basic level to the advanced level.  Whether you are an individual or corporate client we can customize training course content as per your requirement.  And can arrange this Oracle c2m training as per your pace.

Oracle Utilities Customer to Meter (C2M) solution delivers an end-to-end and united platform that connects utilities’ needs now and into the near and far future. Oracle Utilities Customer solution skillfully controls each phase of the customer lifecycle, starting from billing and back office operations, to customer programs and deep customer commitment. The Oracle C2M course is specifically designed for business planners who are responsible for the analysis process portion of a C2M implementation. Through this course, one can get to learn how to design this specific product to meet the required business needs, conserving the main business objects, using the products main features, record all the steps required to implement the system, process the basic elements of the Oracle Utilities C2M infrastructure required to set up and bill customers and acknowledge the browser user interface, technical architecture, plug-ins and characteristics of this solution.

·         It delivers magnificent service in every stage of customer interaction.
